#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>
#include <string_view>

struct MessagePacket {
    uint32_t header;
    std::string_view message;
};

MessagePacket read_header_and_message(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    // Create a non-const span from the const span
    auto non_const_buffer = const_cast<std::span<uint8_t>>(buffer);
    
    // Create a buffer_adaptor for the non-const buffer
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::span<uint8_t>> adaptor(non_const_buffer);
    
    // Create a binary_stream from the adaptor
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    
    // Read the header
    uint32_t header;
    stream >> header;
    
    // Read the null-terminated string
    std::string_view message = stream.view();
    
    return {header, message};
}

```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct CompactPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::vector<std::string> tags;
    std::string data;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_compact_packet(const CompactPacket& packet) {
    // Create a buffer
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;

    // Create a binary_stream for writing
    hexi::binary_stream<std::vector<uint8_t>> stream(buffer);

    // Write the packet_id as a POD
    stream << packet.packet_id;

    // Write the tags vector with prefixed_varint adaptor
    stream << hexi::prefixed_varint(packet.tags);

    // Write the data string with prefixed_varint adaptor
    stream << hexi::prefixed_varint(packet.data);

    return buffer;
}

CompactPacket deserialize_compact_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    CompactPacket packet;

    // Copy the span into a vector
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer_vec(buffer.begin(), buffer.end());

    // Create a binary_stream for reading with the buffer and read limit set to the buffer size
    hexi::binary_stream<std::vector<uint8_t>> stream(buffer_vec, buffer_vec.size());

    // Read the packet_id as a POD
    stream >> packet.packet_id;

    // Read the tags vector with prefixed_varint adaptor
    stream >> hexi::prefixed_varint(packet.tags);

    // Read the data string with prefixed_varint adaptor
    stream >> hexi::prefixed_varint(packet.data);

    return packet;
}
```
